positive: A minimalist, highly stylized forest of bioluminescent flora and fauna, viewed from a centered, symmetrical perspective. The scene features large, clean silhouettes of stylized tropical leaves, glowing mushrooms, and whimsical forest spirits. The composition must have high contrast, utilizing deep midnight blues, neon cyan, emerald green, and magenta accents. The lighting should be ethereal, emanating solely from the flora itself, creating strong rim lighting and depth. Perfect for screen printing or detailed textile art. Vector art aesthetic, clean lines, graphic novel style, symmetry, jungle fantasy, botanical illustration, high contrast, tattoo flash.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, low resolution, grainy, noise, excessive detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, signature, logo, smudge, watermark, photorealistic, sketch, grayscale, monochrome
